description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden bucket with a polygonal, slightly tapered body and reinforced by two dark metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections. The bucket features a prominent, angular bail handle made of metal, attached to the rim with large, hexagonal bolts on opposite sides. The wood staves are vertically aligned and have a natural, slightly rough texture, giving the bucket a rustic appearance. The interior is open and hollow, suitable for carrying liquids or loose materials. The metal bands and handle provide structural support and durability, while the open top allows for easy filling and emptying. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A polygonal wooden bucket with dark metal bands and a sturdy metal bail handle, featuring a rustic, utilitarian design and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, polygonal wood staves, and both metal bands; the handle is visible but not prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal bail handle attachment with a large hexagonal bolt and the bucket's angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open top and both metal bands, with the handle visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other handle attachment and bolt, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
